item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 828
item.description:

25
26 Man Tax: Asher Lax **No Creator Spotlight tonight, everything in my feed is people I've featured a lot recently. Tag me if you spot something fantastic.
“We live in a world changing so rapidly that what we mean frequently by common sense is doing the thing that would have been right last year.” - Edwin H. Land So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Its Wednesday
item.description: Frogs are incredibly important for the local ecosystem. Their whole body can absorb toxic substances and their habitat is the first to go during drought. Making them the canaries of your ecosystem health. They also eat spiders and mosquitoes.
item.dc:creator: Rebatu

item.dc:creator: NancyNovikova

item.title: GovBrief Today #453
item.description: Tim Kaine tried today to stop a war before it started, and 51 senators said he was too early because there was no war with Cuba. We have been in an undeclared war in Iran for sixty-two days. Thirteen American servicemembers are dead, gas is at $4.17, and U.S. bases in the region have sustained $5 billion in damage. The Senate had already voted down every war powers resolution on Venezuela and Iran. Today it added Cuba. Three Republicans broke ranks to even allow the debate. The other 50 told Trump he is free to do whatever he wants to Cuba. Call through 5 Calls and Resistbot and demand your senators stop the next war before it starts. I've emailed 7,176 stories over 453 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your name at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Easy-click links, data, images on the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260428-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/charles-speech [2] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-merz [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr28 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/sc-voter-rolls [5] https://go.govbrief.today/az-ballot-win [6] https://go.govbrief.today/fcc-disney [7] https://go.govbrief.today/gas-high [8] https://go.govbrief.today/ship-searched [9] https://go.govbrief.today/ballroom-filing [10] https://go.govbrief.today/minn-warrants [11] https://go.govbrief.today/comey-seashell [12] https://go.govbrief.today/niaid-aide-conceal [13] https://go.govbrief.today/portland-tear-gas [14] https://go.govbrief.today/hurley-sidelined [15] https://go.govbrief.today/webster-retiring [16] https://go.govbrief.today/cuba-resolution [17] https://go.govbrief.today/epa-protesters [18] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-passport [19] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-detention-ruling Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: They let it happen, because of course they did
item.dc:creator: GullahGullahIslander

item.title: It’s MAGIC!!
item.description:
An amazing Imgurian gifted me with a cordless water fountain because the last set of kittens chewed through the cord of my last one, and the babies seem super interested. Thank you thank you!! This is awesome!!
I’m about to give them their dinner but a few of them are wondering: What is this magic of moving water??
I still can’t believe they are big enough to reach the fountain. They are tiny babies. Too small, right?? Nope. They’re basically grown ass cats. Unacceptable. I shall live in the memory of them being teeny potatoes who can’t see or hear or survive without mama. Let me have this, please. (Side note: many of you have asked me to post my wishlist, to help out a bit. I very rarely do this, but with the kittens getting so big and eating so much and pooping so much and playing so much, there are a few things that would help. I hate feeling like I’m begging for stuff, but so many of you have messaged me to ask. I’ll share my wishlist on my posts tonight - and tonight only - so if the spirit moves you, I would definitely appreciate the help! https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/2K634G59XZTP4? )
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Good night
item.description:
Frank helping sort socks. Apparently none of them go in the bin
He brought this toy and demanded we play. Okay.
Chessie just wanted lap time. She's adorable. Good night imgur. Tiny octopus just got done fixing a code issue that was left over from contractors who didn't get their contract renewed. It took them two years to write the equivalent of a box full of mouse turds duct taped to an angry boar. It took tiny octopus two weeks to understand wtf they were doing and four days to at least make it look pretty and actually functional for the clients. The backend is still a pair of half dead pigeons tied to a brick, but it works. Mostly. Were supposed to do a two year modernization effort, and fuck, tiny octopus wants on that team. Wish him luck.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: 86 means off the menu, removed, or removed from a bar, nixed. The way the Jordan Peterson side of this GOP that manufactures new definitions to control narratives. Amazing.
